title: OCI IAM Policy Modified
description: Detects changes to OCI IAM Policies.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createpolicy' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.updatepolicy' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.deletepolicy')))
falsepositives: Routine policy changes by authorized administrators
